title: Huperzia quasipolytrichoides

taxonomy: Huperzia quasipolytrichoides is a species of plant in the family Lycopodiaceae. This plant is commonly classified as a type of club moss. The classification of Huperzia quasipolytrichoides is further broken down into the kingdom Plantae, division Lycopodiophyta, and class Lycopodiopsida. It is also known to be placed within the order Lycopodiales and family Lycopodiaceae. The classification of this plant is essential for understanding its unique characteristics and evolutionary history.
